data.title: McAfee partners with Pat McAfee to promote online safety to sports fans. Collaboration aims to reach engaged audience.
data.description: In San Jose, California, McAfee, a prominent online security company, revealed a fresh partnership with renowned sports figure Pat McAfee. The aim is to promote McAfee’s enhanced protection services to the highly enthusiastic fan base of sports and entertainment through Pat’s engaging personality and humor. The collaborative campaign, which commenced today, aims to simplify safety and security by leveraging Pat’s energetic voice. The initial video in the series capitalizes on Pat's charisma to connect with the audience.

data.title: Jailhouse Studios planned in Chattanooga as world's first quantum-ready data/AI center, creator campus.
data.description: A collaboration between real estate, technology, and entertainment industry experts has resulted in the establishment of Jailhouse Studios in Chattanooga, Tennessee. The former downtown jail in Hamilton County is set to become the world's premier quantum-ready sovereign data, processing, and AI center and creator campus. This innovative venture will combine advanced technology with creative production to offer groundbreaking services. With years of exploration behind it, Jailhouse Studios is poised to be a pioneer in the industry.

data.title: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) acquires Astro Technology, creators of Astro web framework, in push for high-performance web development.
data.description: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) revealed the integration of The Astro Technology Company team, makers of the Astro web framework, into their company.

data.title: North American utilities utilizing AI for grid modernization per ISG, becoming customer-centric.
data.description: In North America, utilities are embracing AI-powered and data-focused technologies to enhance grid systems and improve customer service, according to ISG. The implementation of these advanced tools is on the rise, with an increasing number of companies incorporating AI solutions to boost efficiency and responsiveness. This shift towards modernization highlights the industry's commitment to innovation, with significant investments being made to upgrade infrastructure and streamline operations for better service delivery.

data.title: CR Fitness Holdings, a top Crunch Fitness franchise, surpasses 1 million members, contributing to Crunch Fitness' 3 million worldwide.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on January 16, 2026, CR Fitness Holdings, a top franchise group of Crunch Fitness, revealed that they have exceeded 1 million members across the country. This milestone adds to Crunch Fitness' total of over 3 million members globally.

data.title: Gentex Corporation introduces Ops-Core NOMAD System for night vision systems, geared in providing stability for users.
data.description: Gentex Corporation, a renowned company in personal protection solutions, unveiled the Ops-Core NOMAD System in Carbondale, Pennsylvania. This innovative system is designed to securely mount night vision and visual augmentation systems for defense forces, emergency responders, and industrial personnel without requiring a traditional ballistic or bump helmet. The Ops-Core NOMAD System provides stability and a low-profile design for optimal performance. This launch signifies Gentex Corporation's commitment to enhancing situational awareness.

data.title: Tom Lee invests $200M in Mr. Beast, morning news update.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in the past 50 years, with a total of 164,000 jobs added in the month of July. This decrease in unemployment was largely driven by gains in professional and technical services, healthcare, social assistance, and financial activities sectors. Additionally, the average hourly earnings rose by 0.3% in July, making it a 3.2% increase over the past year. The current labor force participation rate stands at 63.0%, indicating a slight decline. Overall, the job market in the US shows positive growth and stability.

data.title: NYSE provides daily pre-market update. Singapore software firm TechCreate rings NYSE bell after IPO on Jan. 16, 2026. Kristen Scholer delivers the update.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) shared a daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can gain valuable market insights by accessing the NYSE Pre-market update before the start of trading. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on this day, offering key information to help traders make informed decisions. Stay informed with the latest data directly from the NYSE Trading Floor to potentially improve trading strategies and outcomes.

data.title: Fleetzero secures $43 million Series A for ship electrification, expanding with new facility in Houston.
data.description: In Houston on January 16, 2026, Fleetzero, a company specializing in hybrid and electric propulsion systems for ships, revealed a significant development. They secured $43 million in Series A funding and launched a new manufacturing and research facility in Houston, Texas. The substantial investment will support the company's efforts in advancing eco-friendly marine technology.

data.title: In 2026, Citadel Aviation starts with 13 VIP aircraft projects for technology upgrades and connectivity.
data.description: In Lake Charles, Louisiana on January 16, 2026, Citadel Aviation has begun the year on a high note by winning contracts for 13 new VIP aircraft projects. These projects, concentrating on state-of-the-art technology and connectivity enhancements, are for both narrow- and wide-body aircrafts.

data.title: Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. will release Q4 2025 earnings on Jan. 16, 2026, followed by a conference call with executives.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Westerly, Rhode Island, Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: WASH), the holding company of The Washington Trust Company, is set to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company will also conduct a conference call where top executives will provide insights into the earnings report. This upcoming event signifies an important milestone for the corporation and its stakeholders.

data.title: Ohioans want better protections for state lands and water, with thousands opposing leasing Wayne National Forest for fracking over the past decade.
data.description: In Athens, Ohio, as of January 16, 2026, thousands of comments have consistently been sent to the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) over the past decade to resist the leasing of the Wayne National Forest for unconventional oil and gas operations, specifically fracking. The ongoing opposition reflects a significant number of individuals concerned about environmental risks and consequences associated with such activities.

data.title: PNC shows strong Q4 fiscal 2025 results: EPS $4.88 (estimate $4.21), revenue $6.07B (projection $5.96B), 3% Q/Q revenue growth.
data.description: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) saw a rise in its stock following the release of its fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results, which exceeded expectations. The bank reported earnings per share of $4.88, surpassing the consensus estimate of $4.21, while quarterly revenue reached $6.07 billion, exceeding the projected $5.96 billion. PNC experienced a 3% increase in revenue quarter-over-quarter (Q/Q). Net interest income (NII) also rose by 2% Q/Q to $3.73 billion, driven by decreased funding costs, loan growth, and fixed-rate asset repricing. The net interest margin increased by five basis points Q/Q to 2.84%. Noninterest income saw a 3% Q/Q increase to $2.34 billion, fueled by higher fee income. Average loans grew by 1% Q/Q to $327.9 billion, primarily due to commercial loan growth. Meanwhile, average deposits increased by 2% Q/Q to $439.5 billion.

data.title: Worthington Enterprises acquires LSI Group, LLC in Logansport, Indiana.
data.description: Today, Worthington Enterprises successfully finalized the acquisition of LSI Group, LLC located in Logansport, Indiana. This strategic move is set to enhance Worthington Enterprises' position in the market and further expand their operations. The acquisition of LSI Group, LLC is anticipated to bring significant benefits to both companies, with a focus on driving growth and increasing profitability. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for Worthington Enterprises and reinforces its commitment to strategic growth and development.

data.title: VolitionRx sponsors symposium at VMX conference in Henderson, Nev. Date: Jan. 16, 2026. Ticker: VNRX on NYSE AMERICAN.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Henderson, Nevada, VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX), a global epigenetics company, revealed its sponsorship of an industry symposium during the prestigious Veterinary Meeting and Expo (VMX). This conference is a key event in veterinary education and is considered the foremost in the field.

data.title: Tudou Guarantee, linked to Huione, to end with refunds of $130M in USDT: Bitrace.
data.description: According to recent reports, a record-breaking number of 3,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been recorded in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to over 50,000, raising concerns about the effectiveness of current preventative measures. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 800, with 20 new fatalities reported today alone. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to strict safety protocols to curb the spread of the virus and avoid overwhelming the healthcare system. The government is considering implementing stricter restrictions in the coming days to combat the escalating crisis.
